Items.Title: 生产力...作为开发人员？ | Productivity... As a Developer??
Items.Description:
优素福麦克风

发表于 6 月 6 日

好的，许多开发人员 - 像我一样 - 都痴迷于生产力，所以这里有一些东西：
应用：

当然，作为任何开发人员，我们主要使用应用程序——除非你是程序员爷爷并且你使用笔和纸——所以这是我的收藏：

文本编辑器：VSCode
它可以正常工作，快速，可靠，FOSS，并且有很多扩展
如果你想要 VSCode 以外的东西，你可以在文本编辑器上查看我的列表

浏览器：Firefox 开发者版：
它是开源的，快速的（而不是看着你的 Chrome 的内存猪）并且它让我对自己感觉更好：D。

备注: 黑曜石
我真的很喜欢它，它是 FOSS，速度快，而且我喜欢我可以在任何地方打开它们的方式，因为它使用 markdown。

好的，这不是开源的，但它实际上是最好的之一。 它是极简主义的快速而美丽的。

项目管理：FocalBoard
如果您从未听说过这个，那么您已经错过了太多，它就像一个 trello/概念混合体。

方法：

所以，这不会是一个很大的章节，但我建议你阅读 David Allen 的 Getting Things Done，以及 Thiago Forte 的 Building a Second Brain

结论：

编程很难，这些技巧/应用程序会帮助你！

一旦暂停，youssefmic 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

解除暂停后，youssefmic 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

取消发布后，yoursefmic 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 youssefmic 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 youssefmic：

降低 youssefmic 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 youssefmic 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Youssef-mic

Posted on Jun 6

Ok, many developers -like me- are obsessed with productivity so here are so things:
(Note: these are my ideas and thoughts)

Apps:

Of course, as any developer we mainly use apps -unless you are coder grandpa and you use pen and paper- so here is my collection:

Text Editor: VSCode
It just works, it's fast, reliable, FOSS, and it has a lot of extentions
If you want something other than VSCode you can see my list on text editors

Browser: Firefox Developer Edition:
It's open source, fast (and not a memory hog looking at you Chrome) and it makes me feel better about myself :D.

Notes: Obsidian
I really like it it's FOSS, fast, and I like how I can open them anywhere because it uses markdown.

TODOS: Todoist
Ok, this is not open-source, but it is actually one of the best. It is minimalist fast and beautiful.

Project Management: FocalBoard
If you've never heard of this one, you have been missing soooo much, it is like a trello/notion hybrid.

Methods:

So, this won't be a large chapter, but I suggest you reading Getting Things Done by David Allen, also Building a Second Brain by Thiago Forte

Conclusion:

Programming is hard, and these tips/apps will help you!

Divyanshu Shekhar - May 21

Once suspended, youssefmic will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, youssefmic will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by youssefmic will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If youssefmic is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag youssefmic:

Make all posts by youssefmic less visible

youssefmic consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging youssefmic will restore default visibility to their posts.
